name: Corn Pudding
recipeIngredient: 2 pounds corn, fresh cut or frozen
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Grease and flour a 9x13 baking dish.
3. Combine diced red bell pepper, green bell pepper, and Anaheim chili pepper in a bowl and set aside.
4. In a large bowl, combine flour, sugar, baking powder, salt, and cayenne pepper. Mix to blend and set aside.
5. Place eggs in another large mixing bowl and whisk lightly.
6. Whisk in cream, melted butter, and cream-style corn into the egg mixture.
7. Slowly pour the egg mixture into the flour mixture, stirring constantly.
8. Stir in the diced peppers and corn.
9. Pour the pudding into the prepared baking dish.
10. Bake for 40-45 minutes or until the pudding is golden brown and firm. Makes 16-20 servings.
